    Ingredients:

    • Ren Shen (Ginseng): three qian
    • Bai Fu Ling (White Poria): three qian
    • Shu Di Huang (Prepared Rehmannia): three qian
    • Xiao Hui Xiang (Fennel): three qian
    • Bai Zhu (Atractylodes): four qian
    • Chuan Xiong (Ligusticum): four qian
    • Dang Gui (Angelica): five qian
    • Bai Shao (White Peony): five qian
    • Xiang Fu (Cyperus): five qian
    • Gan Cao (Licorice): one qian
    • Huang Qin (Scutellaria): one qian
    • Chai Hu (Bupleurum): one qian

    Grind and divide into six or seven doses. Each dose takes half a bowl of water and three slices of ginger, decoct until reduced to seven parts, and take warm on an empty stomach. After finishing this medicine, then take the regulating menstrual pills.

    If there is abdominal pain, add three qian each of Yan Hu Suo, Gan Qi, and Zhi Ke. If there is vomiting and nausea, add two qian each of Liang Jiang and Sha Ren. If there are numbness in hands or feet, add one and a half qian of Rou Gui. If there is coughing, add Wu Wei Zi, Dong Hua, and Xing Ren.[237p]

    起枕散 【《医鉴》】 　治儿枕痛。　　当归　白芍药各二钱　川芎一钱半　白芷　桂心　蒲黄　牡丹皮　延胡索　五灵脂　没药各七分　　右剉，作一站，水煎，入好酢，空心服。
    　　四味汤[汤　原作「物」，据《妇人大全良方》产后门改。 ]【丹溪】 　治产后血运。　　当归　延胡索　血竭　没药各一钱
    　　右粗末，童便煎服。《入门》作细末，每二钱，童便调下，名曰四味散。
    　　补气养血汤 【《回春》】 　治小产后下血不止。　　人参　黄芪　当归　白朮　白芍药酒妙　艾叶　阿胶　川芎　青皮　香附炒　砂仁研　甘草炙，各一钱　　右銼，作一贴，水煎服。

    　　二母散 【《圣惠》】 　治产后恶露流入肺经，咳嗽。　　知母、贝母　白茯苓　人参各一钱　桃仁　杏仁各二钱　　右銼，作一贴，水煎服[238p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[238p]

    Qizhen San (Relieving Headache Powder)
    For treating children's head pain:
    Angelica (Dang Gui) and White Peony (Bai Shao) each 2 qian, Chuanxiong 1.5 qian, White Atractylodes (Bai Zhi), Cinnamon (Gui Xin), Cat Tail (Pu Huang), Peony (Mu Dan Pi), Yunhu Suo (Yan Hu Suo), Wulingzhi, Myrrh (Mo Yao) each 7 fen.
    Crush the ingredients and make into a paste, decoct in water, add good vinegar, and take on an empty stomach.

    Siwei Tang (Four Flavor Decoction)
    For treating postpartum blood circulation:
    Angelica (Dang Gui), Yunhu Suo (Yan Hu Suo), Dragon’s Blood (Xue Jie), and Myrrh (Mo Yao) each 1 qian.
    Grind them coarsely and decoct with children's urine. The "Entering the Door" text mentions finely ground, 2 qian, mixed with children's urine, called Siwei San.

    Buqi Yangxue Tang (Qi-nourishing and Blood-nourishing Decoction)
    For treating excessive bleeding after miscarriage:
    Ginseng (Ren Shen), Astragalus (Huang Qi), Angelica (Dang Gui), White Atractylodes (Bai Zhu), White Peony (Bai Shao) wine, Mugwort (Ai Ye), Donkey-hide Gelatin (A Jiao), Chuanxiong, Green Peel (Qing Pi), Stir-fried Cyperus (Xiang Fu), ground Sand Ginger (Sha Ren), and Licorice (Gan Cao) each 1 qian.
    Grind the ingredients, make into a paste, and decoct in water.

    Ermu San (Two Mothers Powder)
    For treating postpartum lochia flowing into the lung channel and causing cough:
    Anemarrhena (Zhi Mu), Fritillaria (Bei Mu), White Poria (Bai Fu Ling), and Ginseng (Ren Shen) each 1 qian, Peach Kernel (Tao Ren) and Apricot Kernel (Xing Ren) each 2 qian.
    Grind into a paste and decoct in water.[238p]

    小参苏饮云岐方　治产后败血入肺，面黑发喘欲死者。　　苏木　人参
    　　右苏木二两，水二碗，煎至一碗，调人参细末二钱服之。
    　　旋覆花汤 【《三因方》】 　治产后感冒风寒，咳喘痰盛。　　旋覆花　赤芍药　荆芥穗　半夏曲　五味子　麻黄　赤茯苓　杏仁　前胡　甘草各一钱　　右銼，作一站，入姜三片，枣二枚，水煎服。
    　　柴胡破瘀汤 【《入门》，下同】 　治产后因伤寒热病，热入血室，或恶露不下者。　　柴胡　黄芩　半夏　甘草　赤芍药　当归　生地黄各一钱　桃仁　五灵脂各五分　　右銼，作一贴，水煎服。

    　　柴胡防归汤　治产后发热，风寒表证。　　当归三钱　川芎一钱半　柴胡　人参各一钱　半夏　陈皮　防风各八分　甘草五分　　右銼，作一贴，入姜三片，枣二枚，水煎服。[239p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[239p]

    Xiao Can Su Drink

    For treating postpartum blood loss entering the lungs, causing blackening of the face, wheezing, and wanting to die.

    Ingredients: Su Mu (Sappan wood), Ren Shen (ginseng)

    Take 2 taels of Su Mu, 2 bowls of water, decoct until reduced to 1 bowl, then mix in 2 qian of finely powdered Ren Shen and take.

    Xuanfu Flower Decoction (from "San Yin Fang")

    For treating postpartum cold and flu, with severe cough and phlegm.

    Ingredients: Xuanfu Flower, Chi Shao Yao (Red Peony), Jing Jie (Schizonepeta), Ban Xia Qu (Pinellia), Wu Wei Zi (Schisandra), Ma Huang (Ephedra), Chi Fu Ling (Red Poria), Xing Ren (Apricot kernel), Qian Hu (Peucedanum), Gan Cao (Licorice) each 1 qian.

    Grind these together for one dose, add 3 slices of ginger and 2 jujubes, and decoct with water to take.

    Chai Hu Po Yu Decoction (from "Ru Men," same source)

    For treating postpartum fever due to cold illnesses, with heat entering the blood chamber or lochia not flowing.

    Ingredients: Chai Hu (Bupleurum), Huang Qin (Scutellaria), Ban Xia, Gan Cao, Chi Shao Yao, Dang Gui (Angelica), Sheng Di Huang (Raw Rehmannia) each 1 qian; Tao Ren (Peach kernel), Wu Ling Zhi (Wulingzhi) each 5 fen.

    Grind these together for one patch, decoct with water to take.

    Chai Hu Fang Gui Decoction

    For treating postpartum fever, with wind-cold exterior symptoms.

    Ingredients: Dang Gui 3 qian, Chuan Xiong (Chuanxiong) 1.5 qian, Chai Hu, Ren Shen each 1 qian; Ban Xia, Chen Pi (Aged Tangerine Peel), Fang Feng (Siler) each 8 fen; Gan Cao 5 fen.

    Grind these together for one patch, add 3 slices of ginger and 2 jujubes, and decoct with water to take.[239p]

    竹叶防风汤　治产后伤寒，头痛发热。　　青竹叶二十四片　防风　人参　桂枝　桔梗　前胡　陈皮　赤茯苓各一钱　　右銼，作一贴，入姜三片，枣二枚，水煎服。
    　　当归黄芪饮 【丹溪】 　治产后阴脱。　　黄芪酒炒，三钱　人参　当归　升麻各二钱　甘草一钱　　右銼，作一贴，水煎服，日三。

    　　硫黄汤 【《正传》】 　治产后玉门不敛。　　硫黄四两　吴萸　菟丝各一两半　蛇床子一两　　右研，每五钱，水一碗煎汤，乘温频熏洗患处，自敛。
    　　血风汤 【丹溪】 　治产后诸风挛急或痿弱。　　川芎　当归　熟地黄　白朮　白茯苓各一两　白芍药　秦艽　羌活　白芷各七钱　防风五钱　　右以一半为细末，温酒调下二钱；以一半为末，蜜丸梧子大，温酒吞下五七十丸。[240p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[240p]

    Bamboo Leaf Wind-Preventing Decoction: Treats postpartum febrile illness, headache, and fever.

    • 24 pieces of green bamboo leaves
    • 1 qian each of wind-protecting herb, ginseng, cinnamon twig, platycodon, fang feng, dried tangerine peel, and red poria.
      Grind them together, make a paste, add 3 slices of ginger and 2 jujubes, and decoct in water to take.

    Angelica and Astragalus Decoction: Treats postpartum yin deficiency.

    • 3 qian of stir-fried astragalus,
    • 2 qian each of ginseng, angelica, and raw licorice.
      Grind them together, make a paste, decoct in water to take three times a day.

    Sulfur Decoction: Treats postpartum inability to close the Yin Gate (vaginal canal).

    • 4 liang of sulfur,
    • 1.5 liang each of wuyou and dodder,
    • 1 liang of snake bed seeds.
      Grind, and for every 5 qian, decoct in 1 bowl of water, warm and frequently fumigate and wash the affected area to help it close.

    Blood Wind Decoction: Treats postpartum wind contractions or weakness.

    • 1 liang each of chuanxiong, angelica, cooked rehmannia, white atractylodes, and white poria,
    • 7 qian each of white peony root, gentian, qianghuo, and white angelica,
    • 5 qian of wind-protecting herb.
      Use half of it to make a fine powder, mixing 2 qian with warm wine; use the other half to make honey pills the size of wutong nuts, swallowing 50 to 70 pills with warm wine.[240p]

    桃仁汤 【《良方》，下同】 　治产后恶露方行，忽然断绝，腰腹重痛，或流注腿股作痛。　　桃仁去皮尖研泥　苏木　生地黄各五钱　蝱虫去足翅　水蛭并炒，各三十枚　　右为粗末，每三钱水一盏，煎至六分，去滓温服，恶血下即止。如有大痛虚，必作痈疽，宜取五香连翘汤去大黄，水煎，入竹沥服之。
    　　五香连翘汤　治恶露作痈疽。
    　　木香　沉香　丁香　乳香　升麻　独活　麝香　连翘　木通　桑寄生各二两　　右(口父)咀，水二盏，煮取一盏，去滓，入竹沥许，温服。一方有大黄一两。
    　　桃桂当归丸　治产后恶露方行，忽然断绝，骤作寒热，脐腹百脉皆痛，状如锥刺。　　桂心　赤芍药各五钱　当归　桃仁去皮尖　没药各二钱半　蝱虫　水蛭并炒，各三十枚　　右为细末，酢面糊和丸碗豆大，酢汤下二十丸。[241p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[241p]

    Peach Kernel Decoction
    Treats postpartum lochia that suddenly ceases, with heavy pain in the lower back and abdomen, or pain radiating to the legs.

    • 5 qian of peeled and ground peach kernels
    • 5 qian of su mu (sandalwood)
    • 5 qian of raw rehmannia
    • 30 pieces each of dried Cnidium (removed feet and wings) and water leeches (stir-fried)

    Grind the above into a coarse powder. For every 3 qian, use one cup of water, and simmer until reduced to two-thirds. Strain and take warm; when the harmful blood is expelled, treatment can stop. If there is great pain suggesting a deficiency, it may lead to abscesses, so one should take Wuxiang Lianqiao Soup without rhubarb, decocted in water and consumed with bamboo juice.

    Wuxiang Lianqiao Soup
    Treats lochia leading to abscesses.

    • 2 liang each of:
      • Mu Xiang
      • Chen Xiang
      • Clove
      • Frankincense
      • Sheng Ma (bugbane)
      • Du Huo (angelica)
      • Musk
      • Lian Qiao (forsythia)
      • Mu Tong (dogwood)
      • Sang Ji Sheng (mulberry mistletoe)

    Grind the above into a coarse powder. Use 2 cups of water to boil down to one cup, strain, and add bamboo juice as desired, taking it warm. One variation includes 1 liang of rhubarb.

    Peach and Cinnamon Dang Gui Pills
    Treats postpartum lochia that suddenly ceases, accompanied by rapid shifts of cold and heat, with pain throughout the navel and abdomen, feeling like needle pricks.

    • 5 qian each of:
      • Cinnamon heart
      • Red peony root
    • 2.5 qian each of:
      • Angelica
      • Peeled and ground peach kernel
      • Myrrh
    • 30 pieces each of dried Cnidium (stir-fried) and water leeches

    Grind the above into a fine powder, mix with vinegar to form dough-sized pills, and take 20 pills with vinegar soup.[241p]

    养血佐肝丸 【《医鉴》，下同】 　治产后左胁胀闷，有一块痛，卧不着席。　　香附酢炒，一两　当归　川芎　白芍药酒炒　陈皮　半夏油炒　白朮土炒　丹皮　神曲炒　萝卜子炒　青皮油炒　红花　茯苓各一两　柴胡酒炒　桃仁炒，各八钱　草龙胆酒洗，六钱　三棱　蓬朮并酢炒，各五钱　　右为末，酒糊和丸梧子大，空心白汤下百丸。
    　　推气养血丸　治产后右胁膨胀，有块如竖弦一条，着冷便疼。　　便制香附二两　当归　川芎　自芍药酒炒　白朮土炒　青皮油炒　陈皮　枳实　乌药　厚朴　神曲　干姜炒黑　白芥子炒，各一两　三棱酢炒　蓬莪朮酢炒，各八钱　麦芽炒　肉桂各六钱　木香三钱　　右为末，酢糊和丸梧子大，空心，以米饮吞下百丸。[242p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[242p]

    Blood Nourishing Liver Pill

    Treats postnatal left hypochondriac distension and pain, causing insomnia.

    Ingredients:

    • 1 liang of Xiangfu (Cyperus rotundus) sautéed in vinegar
    • 1 liang of Danggui (Angelica sinensis)
    • 1 liang of Chuanxiong (Ligusticum chuanxiong)
    • 1 liang of Baishao (Paeonia lactiflora) sautéed in wine
    • 1 liang of Chenpi (Citrus reticulata)
    • 1 liang of Banxia (Pinellia ternata) sautéed in oil
    • 1 liang of Baizhu (Atractylodes macrocephala) sautéed in soil
    • 1 liang of Danpi (Moutan cortex)
    • 1 liang of Shenqu (Fermented wheat) sautéed
    • 1 liang of Luobozi (Radish seeds) sautéed
    • 1 liang of Qingpi (Green tangerine peel) sautéed in oil
    • 1 liang of Honghua (Carthamus tinctorius)
    • 1 liang of Fuling (Poria cocos)
    • 8 qian of Chaihu (Bupleurum) sautéed in wine
    • 8 qian of Taoren (Peach kernel) sautéed
    • 6 qian of Caolongdan (Gentian)
    • 5 qian each of Sanleng (Sparganium) and Pojiao (Atractylodes)

    Grind the above into a powder, mix with wine to form pills the size of walnuts, to be taken with warm water, one hundred pills at a time.

    Qi Regulation and Blood Nourishing Pill

    Treats postnatal right hypochondriac swelling, with a pain like a taut string that worsens with cold.

    Ingredients:

    • 2 liang of Xiangfu (Cyperus rotundus)
    • 1 liang each of Danggui (Angelica sinensis), Chuanxiong (Ligusticum chuanxiong), Baishao (Paeonia lactiflora) sautéed in wine, Baizhu (Atractylodes macrocephala) sautéed in soil, Qingpi (Green tangerine peel) sautéed in oil, Chenpi (Citrus reticulata), Zhi Shi (Bitter orange), Wu Yao (Lindera aggregata), Hou Po (Magnolia officinalis), Shenqu (Fermented wheat), Gan Jiang (Dried ginger) sautéed until black, and Bai Jiuzi (White mustard seed)
    • 8 qian each of Sanleng (Sparganium) sautéed in vinegar and Pojiao (Atractylodes) sautéed in vinegar
    • 6 qian each of Maiya (Barley sprout) sautéed and Rougui (Cinnamon)
    • 3 qian of Muxiang (Aromatic wood)

    Grind the above into a powder, mix with vinegar to form pills the size of walnuts, to be taken with rice soup, one hundred pills at a time.[242p]

    香灵丸 【《本事方》】 　治产后呕不止。　　丁香　辰砂另研，各六分　五灵脂一钱　　右研极细，用狗胆或猪胆和丸芡实大，以生姜陈皮煎汤，磨化一丸服之。
    　　参朮膏 【丹溪】 　治产后脬损成淋。　　人参二钱半　白朮二钱　黄芪一钱半　陈皮　葵子　人参各一两　蒲黄　桃胶　滑石　桃仁　白茯苓各一钱　甘草五分　　右銼，作一贴，水煎猪羊脬，后入药再煎，去滓，空心温服。
    　　茅根汤 【《三因方》】 　治产后淋。　　白茅根四两　石首鱼头中石十六个　婴麦　甘草各五钱　白茯苓二两　紫贝五个　　右为末，每二钱木通汤调下，或为粗末，三钱，灯心同煎服，方可。
    　　桑螵蛸散云岐　治产后淋及遗尿。
    　　桑螵蛸十五个，炒　鹿茸酥炙　黄芪各一两半　牡蛎粉　人参　赤石脂　厚朴各一两　　右为末，空心，以米饮调下二钱。[243p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[243p]

    Xiang Ling Wan (from "Ben Shi Fang")
    Treats persistent vomiting after childbirth.
    Six parts of clove and realgar, separately ground;
    One part of five-spice resin.
    Grind finely, mix with dog or pig bile; form into pills the size of adzuki beans.
    Take with a decoction of ginger and dried tangerine peel.

    Shen Zhu Gao (from Dan Xi)
    Treats urinary issues after childbirth.
    Two and a half taels of ginseng; two taels of white atractylodes; one and a half taels of astragalus;
    One tael each of dried tangerine peel and sunflower seeds;
    One tael each of cattail pollen, peach resin, talc, peach kernels, and white poria;
    Five fen of licorice.
    Grind together, create a paste; simmer with pig or sheep bladder, add herbs, then simmer again, strain, and take warm on an empty stomach.

    Mao Gen Tang (from "San Yin Fang")
    Treats urinary issues after childbirth.
    Four taels of white grass root;
    Sixteen stones from the head of a stone perch;
    Five fen each of wheat and licorice;
    Two taels of white poria; five purple shells.
    Grind the ingredients; take two fen mixed with a decoction of Akebia, or grind coarsely, three fen, and cook with lampwick for consumption.

    Sang Piao Xiao San (from Yun Qi)
    Treats urinary issues after childbirth and enuresis.
    Fifteen pieces of saussurea, roasted;
    One and a half taels each of deer antler and roasted astragalus;
    One tael each of oyster powder, ginseng, red stone resin, and magnolia bark.
    Grind together; take two fen on an empty stomach mixed with rice drink.[243p]

    黄芪芍药汤 【《三因方》】 　治产后遗尿不禁。　　黄芪　当归尾　白芍药各一钱半　白朮一钱　人参　陈皮各五分　甘草炙，三分　　右銼，作一贴，水煎，空心服。

    　　的奇散 【《得效方》】 　治产后泄泻，恶露不行。此余血渗入大肠为泻，下青黑色物是验。　　大荆芥穗于盏内然火烧存性，不得犯油火　麝香少许　　右研为末，每取一钱，沸汤一二呷调服，神效。
    　　滋肠五仁丸 【《正传》】 　治产后阴血虚耗，大便闭濇。　　橘红四两　杏仁　桃仁各一两　柏子仁五钱　松子仁二钱半　(木郁)李仁一钱　　右各另研为膏，橘红为末，蜜和丸梧子大，米饮下五六十丸。
    　　五味白朮散 【丹溪】 　治产后肿，宜补中导水行气。　　白朮三钱　陈皮去白一钱半　木通　川芎　赤茯苓各一钱　　右銼，作一贴，水煎吞下，与点丸二十五丸。[244p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[244p]

    Huangqi Shaoyao Decoction (from "San Yin Fang")
    For the treatment of urinary incontinence after childbirth.
    Ingredients: Astragalus (Huangqi) 1.5 qian, Angelica tail (Danggui wei) 1.5 qian, White Peony (Bai Shao) 1.5 qian, Atractylodes (Bai Zhu) 1 qian, Ginseng (Ren Shen) 0.5 qian, Dried Tangerine Peel (Chen Pi) 0.5 qian, and Honey-fried Licorice (Gan Cao) 0.3 qian.
    Grind these ingredients into a paste, decoct with water, and take on an empty stomach.

    Deqi San (from "De Xiaofang")
    For the treatment of postpartum diarrhea and retained lochia. This indicates residual blood seeping into the large intestine causing diarrhea, showing dark blue-black stool.
    Ingredients: Big Sweetscented Flag (Da Jing Jie) burned in a fire in a dish without touching oil, a small amount of Musk (She Xiang).
    Grind into a powder, take 1 qian mixed in boiling water and drink, it is remarkably effective.

    Zichang Wuren Pill (from "Zheng Zhuan")
    For the treatment of postpartum blood deficiency leading to constipation.
    Ingredients: Tangerine Peel (Ju Hong) 4 liang, Apricot Kernel (Xing Ren) 1 liang, Peach Kernel (Tao Ren) 1 liang, Platycladus Seed (Bai Zi Ren) 0.5 liang, Pine Nut (Song Zi Ren) 0.25 liang, Plum Kernel (Li Ren) 0.1 liang.
    Grind each separately into a paste, make the Tangerine Peel into a powder, mix with honey to form pills the size of a jujube, take 50-60 pills with rice drink.

    Wuwai Baizhu Powder (from Dan Xi)
    For the treatment of postpartum swelling, suitable for tonifying and promoting water movement.
    Ingredients: Atractylodes (Bai Zhu) 3 qian, Dried Tangerine Peel (Chen Pi) without white 1.5 qian, Lonicera (Mu Tong) 1 qian, Chuanxiong (Chuan Qiong) 1 qian, Red Poria (Chi Fu Ling) 1 qian.
    Grind these into powder, make into a paste with water, take as a decoction along with 25 pills.[244p]

    补虚汤 【《入门》】 　胎前产后虚热，用此加减。　　人参　白朮各一钱半　当归　川芎　黄芪　陈皮各一钱　甘草七分　　右銼，作一贴，入姜三片，水煎服。如热轻，倍加茯苓。如热重，加酒芩。如热甚，加干姜炒黑，引诸药入肝经生血。
    　　保安丸 【《局方》】 　治产前产后诸疾。　　生干地黄另为末　蚕退纸炙，各一两　赤茯苓　丹皮　白芍药各七钱半　川芎　细辛　人参　肉桂　当归　牛膝　寒水石煅　白芷　木香　附子炮　槁本　麻黄　泽兰　甘草炙　防风　桔梗　蝉蜕各五钱　吴茱萸　沉香各二钱半　　右为末，蜜丸弹子大，酒下一丸。

    　　当归须散 【《入门》，下同】 　治产后瘀血，心腹作痛，兼有寒热。　　红花　桃仁各八分　甘草五分　桂六分　赤芍　乌药　香附　苏木各一钱　　水酒煎服。[245p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[245p]

    Buxu Decoction
    For weakness and heat before and after childbirth, modify this recipe.
    1.5 qian of ginseng and atrae,
    1 qian each of angelica, chuanxiong, astragalus, and dried citrus peel,
    0.7 qian of licorice.
    Grind these together to make a dose, add three slices of ginger, and decoct in water to take. If the heat is mild, double the amount of poria. If the heat is severe, add jujube. If the heat is extreme, add dry ginger roasted until black, which helps the other herbs enter the liver channel to generate blood.

    Bao'an Pill
    For treating various ailments before and after childbirth.
    Separate and grind 2 liang of raw dried rehmannia,
    1 liang each of silkworm cast-off paper,
    7.5 qian each of red poria, moutan root, and white peony root,
    5 qian each of chuanxiong, asarum, ginseng, cinnamon, angelica, and achyranthes,
    2.5 qian each of evodia and agarwood,
    Water calcinated stones, white atractylodes, musk, and prepared aconite, together with 5 qian each of ephedra, azolla, honey-fried licorice, notopterygium, and balloonflower.
    Grind these into a powder, form into pills the size of a marble, and swallow one with wine.

    Angelica Needs to be Powdered
    For treating postpartum blood stasis, abdominal pain, and alternating cold and heat.
    0.8 qian each of safflower and peach kernel,
    0.5 qian of licorice,
    0.6 qian of cinnamon,
    1 qian each of red peony, frankincense, cyperus, and sappan wood.
    Decoct with water and wine to take.[245p]

    熟料五积散　治产后食滞寒热，心腹作痛。　　枳壳五分　白芷　川芎　甘草　茯苓　芍药　当归　桂各三分　陈皮六分　乌药一钱，酢炒　厚朴　干姜各四分　桔梗一分半　半夏二分　苍朮七分半　　右除白芷、桂二味外，余十二味用慢火炒令色变，摊冷，入桂、芷、乌药和匀煎服。
    　　理中汤　治产后感寒心痛。
    　　人参　白朮　干姜各二钱　甘草一钱半　　水煎温服。

    　　木槟汤　治产后七情感伤，血与气并，心痛。　　木香　槟榔　延胡索　金铃子　三棱　莪朮　厚朴　桔梗　川芎　当归　白芍药　黄芩　甘草各等分　　水煎服。

    　　桂心汤　治素有宿寒，因产大虚，寒搏于血，血凝不散，上冲心之络脉，故作心痛。　　桂心　小草　吴茱萸　干姜　独活　熟地　当归　白芍各一钱　甘草　细辛各三分　　水煎服。[246p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[246p]

    Sure! Here is the translated text:

    "Shu Kliao Wu Ji San treats postpartum food stagnation with cold and heat, causing pain in the heart and abdomen. Use the following ingredients: five parts of bitter orange peel, three parts each of white atractylodes, chuanxiong, licorice, fu ling, peony, and angelica, six parts of dried tangerine peel, one part of black drug, and four parts each of dried magnolia bark and dried ginger. One and a half parts of platycodon and two parts of pinellia, and seven and a half parts of azure bark. Except for white atractylodes and cinnamon, the other twelve ingredients are to be sautéed over low heat until their color changes, cooled, and then mixed with cinnamon, atractylodes, and black drug, and decocted for consumption.

    Li Zhong Tang treats postpartum chills and heart pain. Use two qian of ginseng, white atractylodes, and dried ginger each, and one and a half qian of licorice. Decoct in water and take warm.

    Mu Bin Tang treats postpartum emotional distress, with both blood and qi affected, causing heart pain. The ingredients are equal parts of aromatic wood, betel nut, Corydalis, golden bell fruit, san leng, curcuma, dried magnolia bark, platycodon, chuanxiong, angelica, white peony, yellow qin, and licorice. Decoct in water for consumption.

    Gui Xin Tang treats those with existing cold conditions, who become very weak after childbirth, with cold obstructing the blood, causing it to congeal and fail to disperse, leading to heart pain. Use one qian each of cinnamon heart, small licorice, wuzhuyu, dried ginger, du huo, cooked rehmannia, angelica, and white peony, and three fen each of licorice and xixin. Decoct in water for consumption."[246p]

    四君子汤　产后挟寒，肠鸣腹痛，用此加减。　　人参　茯苓　甘草　白朮
    　　姜枣煎服。

    　　三白汤 【《医鉴》，下同】 　治产后脾脉弦腹胀。　　白砂糖一两　鸡子清一个　烧酒一锺半　　煎八分，温服。

    　　生脉散　治产后气虚烦渴。
    　　人参　五味子　麦门冬各味分两随宜　　右为末。

    　　黄雌鸡汤 【《景岳全书》，下同】 　治产后虚羸腹痛。　　当归　白朮炒　熟地　黄芪炒　桂心各半两　小黄雌鸡一只，去头足肠翅细切　　右，先用水七碗，煮鸡至三碗，每用汁一碗，药四钱，煎，日三服。
    　　九宝煎　治产后阳气虚寒，或阴邪入脏，心腹疼痛，呕吐不食，四肢厥冷。　　当归　熟地各三钱　芍药酒炒　茯苓各钱半　炙甘草　干姜炒黑　肉桂　北细辛各一钱　吴茱萸制五分　　水二锺，煎服。[247p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[247p]

    Four Gentlemen Decoction: For postpartum chills, abdominal pain with rumbling intestines, adjust as necessary. Ingredients: Ginseng, Poria, Licorice, Atractylodes. Prepare with ginger and jujube.

    Three Whites Decoction: For postpartum distended abdomen with tight pulse. Ingredients: One ounce of white sugar, one egg white, one and a half jugs of wine. Boil down to eight parts and take warm.

    Sheng Mai Powder: For postpartum qi deficiency, thirst. Ingredients: Ginseng, Schisandra, Ophiopogon, each adjusted to two parts as needed. Grind into a powder.

    Yellow Hen Soup: For postpartum weakness and abdominal pain. Ingredients: Half an ounce each of Angelica, Atractylodes (fried), Rehmannia, Astragalus (fried), and Cinnamon, one small yellow hen (remove head, feet, intestines, and finely chop). First use seven bowls of water to boil the chicken down to three bowls. For each serving, use one bowl of the broth and four qian of the herbs, decoct three times daily.

    Nine Treasures Decoction: For postpartum Yang deficiency with cold, or when Yin pathogens invade the organs, resulting in abdominal pain, vomiting, lack of appetite, and cold extremities. Ingredients: Three qian each of Angelica and Rehmannia, half a qian each of fried Peony and Poria, one qian each of roasted Licorice, dried ginger (fried black), Cinnamon, and North fine Xixin, five fen of Evodia. Use two jugs of water and decoct for internal use.[247p]

    胃关煎　治产后肾气虚寒，泻痢腹痛。　　熟地三五钱或一两　炙甘草一二钱　山药炒　白扁豆炒，各二钱　焦干姜一二钱或三钱　吴茱萸制，五七分　白朮一二三钱　　水二锺，煎七分，食远温服。

    　　排气饮　治产后气逆食滞胀痛等证。　　陈皮　藿香　枳壳各一钱五分　厚朴一钱　泽泻　乌药　香附各二钱　木香七分或一钱　　水一锺半，煎七分，热服。

    　　大和中饮　治同上。
    　　陈皮一二钱　山栀　麦芽各二钱　枳实一钱　砂仁五分　厚朴　泽泻各一钱五分　　水一锺半，煎七分，食远温服。

    　　三柴胡饮　治产后感邪，气不甚虚者。　　柴胡二三钱　芍药一钱半　生姜三五片　炙甘草　陈皮各一钱　当归二钱，溏泄代以生地　　水一锺半，煎七分温服。

    　　四柴胡饮　治产后气虚脾弱而感邪者。　　柴胡一二钱　当归二三钱，泻者少用　炙甘草一钱　人参二三钱或五七钱　生姜三五七片　　水二锺，煎七分，温服。[248p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[248p]

    Wei Guan Decoction: Treats postpartum kidney deficiency with cold, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Ingredients: 熟地 (Shu Di) 30-50 grams or 100 grams, 炙甘草 (Zhi Gan Cao) 10-20 grams, 山药 (Shan Yao) 10 grams, 白扁豆 (Bai Bian Dou) 10 grams, 焦干姜 (Jiao Gan Jiang) 10-30 grams, 吴茱萸 (Wu Zhu Yu) 5-7 grams, 白术 (Bai Zhu) 10-30 grams. Use two cups of water, boil for 70% of the time, and consume warm before meals.

    Qi Emission Drink: Treats postpartum qi stagnation and food accumulation causing bloating and pain. Ingredients: 陈皮 (Chen Pi), 藿香 (Huo Xiang), 枳壳 (Zhi Ke) each 15 grams, 厚朴 (Hou Po) 10 grams, 泽泻 (Ze Xie), 乌药 (Wu Yao), 香附 (Xiang Fu) each 20 grams, 木香 (Mu Xiang) 7-10 grams. Use one and a half cups of water, boil for 70% of the time, and take warm.

    Da He Zhong Drink: Same as above. Ingredients: 陈皮 (Chen Pi) 10-20 grams, 山栀 (Shan Zhi), 麦芽 (Mai Ya) each 20 grams, 枳实 (Zhi Shi) 10 grams, 砂仁 (Sha Ren) 5 grams, 厚朴 (Hou Po), 泽泻 (Ze Xie) each 15 grams. Use one and a half cups of water, boil for 70% of the time, and consume warm before meals.

    San Chai Hu Drink: Treats postpartum invasion of pathogens with qi not severely deficient. Ingredients: 柴胡 (Chai Hu) 20-30 grams, 芍药 (Shao Yao) 15 grams, 生姜 (Sheng Jiang) 3-5 slices, 炙甘草 (Zhi Gan Cao) 10 grams, 陈皮 (Chen Pi) 10 grams, 当归 (Dang Gui) 20 grams. Use one and a half cups of water, boil for 70% of the time, and consume warm.

    Si Chai Hu Drink: Treats postpartum qi deficiency and weak spleen with pathogen invasion. Ingredients: 柴胡 (Chai Hu) 10-20 grams, 当归 (Dang Gui) 20-30 grams (use less if there is diarrhea), 炙甘草 (Zhi Gan Cao) 10 grams, 人参 (Ren Shen) 20-30 grams or 50-70 grams, 生姜 (Sheng Jiang) 3-5-7 slices. Use two cups of water, boil for 70% of the time, and consume warm.[248p]

    五柴胡饮　治产后气虚脾弱而感寒者。　　柴胡一二三钱　当归　白朮炒，各二三钱　熟地三五钱　芍药钱半，炒　炙甘草一钱　陈皮酌用或不用　　水一锺半，煎七分，食远热服。

    　　正柴胡饮　治产妇强壮气实而感寒者。　　柴胡一二钱　防风　甘草各一钱　芍药二钱　陈皮一钱半　生姜三五片　　水一锺半，煎七分、热服。

    　　补阴益气煎　治产后三阴不足而感寒者。　　人参一二三钱　当归　山药酒炒，各二三钱　陈皮　炙甘草各一钱　熟地三五钱或一二两　升麻三五分，火浮于上者去之　柴胡一二钱　　水二锺，加生姜三五七片，煎八分，食远温服。如无外邪者，不必用柴胡。
    　　徙薪饮　治产妇体实火甚，便实尿赤，无表证而发热者；亦治姙娠火盛，迫血妄行。　　陈皮八分　黄芩二钱　麦冬　芍药　黄蘗　茯苓　牡丹皮各一钱半　　水一锺半，煎七分，食远温服。[249p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[249p]

    Wuzhihu Decoction: For treating postpartum qi deficiency and spleen weakness with sensitivity to cold.
    Ingredients: Chaihu 1-3 qian, Danggui, Baizhu (fried), each 2-3 qian; Shudihu 3-5 qian; Shaoyao 0.5 qian (fried); Zhi Gancao 1 qian; Chenpi (use as needed or not).
    Water: 1.5 zhong, decoct to 70% remaining, take warm away from meals.

    Zheng Chaihu Decoction: For treating postpartum women who are strong, having sufficient qi yet feeling cold.
    Ingredients: Chaihu 1-2 qian; Fangfeng, Gancao, each 1 qian; Shaoyao 2 qian; Chenpi 1.5 qian; Shengjiang 3-5 slices.
    Water: 1.5 zhong, decoct to 70%, take warm.

    Buxin Yiqi Decoction: For treating postpartum with insufficient yin leading to sensitivity to cold.
    Ingredients: Renshen 1-3 qian; Danggui, Shanyao (wine-fried), each 2-3 qian; Chenpi, Zhi Gancao, each 1 qian; Shudihu 3-5 qian or 1-2 liang; Shengma 3-5 fen (remove any floating fire).
    Water: 2 zhong, add Shengjiang 3-5-7 slices, decoct to 80%, take warm away from meals. If there are no external pathogens, Chaihu is not necessary.

    Xixin Decoction: For treating postpartum women with solid body and excess fire, having constipation and red urine, with no exterior symptoms yet fever; also for treating excessive fire during pregnancy causing irregular bleeding.
    Ingredients: Chenpi 0.8 qian; Huangqin 2 qian; Maidong, Shaoyao, Huangbo, Fuling, Mudanpi, each 1.5 qian.
    Water: 1.5 zhong, decoct to 70%, take warm away from meals.[249p]

    抽薪饮　治同上。
    　　黄芩　石斛　木通　栀子炒　黄蘗各一二钱　枳壳　泽泻各一钱半　细甘草三分　　水一锺半，煎七分，食远温服。

    　　一阴煎　治同上。
    　　生地　芍药　麦冬　丹参各二钱　甘草一钱　熟地三五钱　牛膝一钱半　　水二锺，煎七分，食远温服。

    　　加减一阴煎　治阴虚兼火甚而大热者。　　生地　芍药　麦冬各二钱　熟地三五钱　知母　地骨皮各一钱　炙甘草五七分　　水二钟，煎服。

    　　三阴煎　治产后阴虚发热，怔忡恍惚。　　当归二三钱　熟地三五钱　炙甘草一钱　芍药酒炒　枣仁各二钱　人参随宜　　水二锺，煎七分，食远服。

    　　大营煎　治产后虚火不归源而发热者。　　当归二三钱或五钱　炙甘草　肉桂各一二钱　枸杞　杜仲各二钱　牛膝一钱半　熟地随宜　　水二锺，煎七分，食远温服。[250p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[250p]

    Chao Xin Yin: Used for the same purpose as above.
    Huang Qin, Shi Hu, Mu Tong, Zhi Zi (stir-fried), Huang Bo, each 1-2 qian; Zhi Ke, Ze Xie, each 1.5 qian; fine Gan Cao 3 fen; 1.5 zhong of water, decoct for 7 parts, take warm after meals.

    Yi Yin Jian: Used for the same purpose as above.
    Sheng Di, Shao Yao, Mai Dong, Dan Shen, each 2 qian; Gan Cao 1 qian; Shu Di 3-5 qian; Niu Xi 1.5 qian; 2 zhong of water, decoct for 7 parts, take warm after meals.

    Jia Jian Yi Yin Jian: Used for symptoms of Yin deficiency with intense fire and great heat.
    Sheng Di, Shao Yao, Mai Dong, each 2 qian; Shu Di 3-5 qian; Zhi Mu, Di Gu Pi, each 1 qian; Zhi Gan Cao 5-7 fen; 2 zhong of water, decoct and take.

    San Yin Jian: Used for postpartum Yin deficiency with fever, anxiety, and confusion.
    Dang Gui 2-3 qian; Shu Di 3-5 qian; Zhi Gan Cao 1 qian; Shao Yao (stir-fried with wine), Jujube seeds, each 2 qian; Ren Shen to taste; 2 zhong of water, decoct for 7 parts, take warm after meals.

    Da Ying Jian: Used for postpartum deficiency heat that does not return to source and causes fever.
    Dang Gui 2-3 qian or 5 qian; Zhi Gan Cao, Rou Gui, each 1-2 qian; Gou Qi, Du Zhong, each 2 qian; Niu Xi 1.5 qian; Shu Di to taste; 2 zhong of water, decoct for 7 parts, take warm after meals.[250p]

    猪腰汤　治产后蓐劳，寒热如疟，自汗无力，咳嗽头痛。　　猪腰一对　当归　白芍药酒炒，各一两　　右以药二味、用水三碗，煎至二碗，去滓，将猪腰切如骰子块，同晚米一合，香豉一钱，加葱椒盐煮稀粥，空心，日服一次，神效。或加人参更妙。
    　　白茯苓散　治产后蓐劳，头目肢体疼痛，寒热如疟。　　白茯苓一两　人参　当归　黄芪　川芎　白芍药　熟地　桂心各半两　猪腰一对　　水三盏，入猪腰，并姜枣各三事，煎二盏，去渣，入前药半两，煎一盏服。
    　　母鸡汤　治产后蓐劳，虚汗不止。
    　　人参　黄芪炙　白朮炒　白茯苓　麻黄根　牡蛎煅，各三钱　　右用母鸡一只，去毛杂，净水六七碗，同药煮至三碗，任意服之。
    　　贞元饮　治产后虚喘。
    　　熟地黄七八钱，甚者一二两　当归二三钱　炙甘草一二三钱　　水二锺，煎八分，温服。[251p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[251p]

    Pig Kidney Soup: For treating postpartum exhaustion, with chills and fever like malaria, spontaneous sweating and weakness, coughing, and headache.
    Ingredients: One pair of pig kidneys, 1 tael of angelica, 1 tael of white peony, sautéed in wine.
    Instructions: Use the two herbs with 3 bowls of water, simmer to 2 bowls, strain, cut the pig kidneys into dice-sized pieces, add 1 cup of evening rice, 1 qian of fragrant soybeans, and cook with scallions, pepper, and salt to make a thin porridge. Consume once daily. Remarkable efficacy. Adding ginseng can enhance the effect.

    White Poria Powder: For treating postpartum exhaustion, with pain in the head, limbs, and body, chills and fever like malaria.
    Ingredients: 1 tael of white poria, 0.5 tael each of ginseng, angelica, astragalus, chuanxiong, white peony, cooked rehmannia, and cinnamon, and a pair of pig kidneys.
    Instructions: Use 3 cups of water, add the pig kidneys and 3 pieces each of ginger and jujube, simmer to 2 cups, strain, season with half a tael of the previous herbs, and simmer again to 1 cup for consumption.

    Hen Soup: For treating postpartum exhaustion with persistent weak sweating.
    Ingredients: 3 qian each of ginseng, roasted astragalus, fried white atractylodes, white poria, ephedra root, and calcined oyster.
    Instructions: Use one hen, clean it of feathers and entrails, add 6 to 7 cups of clean water, and cook with the herbs until reduced to 3 cups. Consume as desired.

    Zhenyuan Decoction: For treating postpartum weakness with shortness of breath.
    Ingredients: 7 to 8 qian of cooked rehmannia (more severe cases: 1 to 2 taels), 2 to 3 qian of angelica, and 1 to 3 qian of roasted licorice.
    Instructions: Use 2 cups of water, simmer to reduce to 80%, and consume warm.[251p]

    大补元煎　治产后发痉，及气虚兼寒，或气血俱虚，淡血津津不已。　　人参少则一二钱，多则一二两　炙甘草一二钱　熟地少则二三钱，多则二三两　山茱萸一钱　山药炒　杜仲各二钱　当归　枸杞各二三钱　　水二锺，煎七分，食远温服。

    　　金水六君煎　治产后外感作喘。
    　　当归　茯苓　半夏各二钱　熟地三五钱　陈皮一钱半　炙甘草一钱　　水二锺，生姜三五七片，煎七分，食远温服。
    　　六安煎　治产后寒邪入脉，气实气壅而本无虚者。　　陈皮一钱半　杏仁去皮尖切　甘草各一钱　半夏二三钱　白芥子五七分，老弱不用　茯苓二钱　　水一锺半、加生姜三五七片，煎七分，食远服。
    　　通瘀煎　治产后瘀血实痛。
    　　归尾三五钱　山栀　香附　红花炒黄，各二钱　乌药一二钱　泽泻　青皮各钱半　木香七分　　水二锺，煎七分，加酒一二小锺，食前服。[252p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[252p]

    Da Bu Yuan Jian: This remedy treats postpartum convulsions, as well as qi deficiency with cold, or both qi and blood deficiency, with pale blood and a constant flow of body fluids.

    • Use:
      • Ginseng: 1-2 qian, up to 1-2 liang
      • Honey-fried Licorice: 1-2 qian
      • Cooked Rehmannia: 2-3 qian, up to 2-3 liang
      • Cornelian Cherry: 1 qian
      • Fried Chinese Yam: 2 qian
      • Eucommia: 2 qian
      • Angelica: 2-3 qian
      • Goji Berries: 2-3 qian
    • Prepare with 2 sheng of water, boil down to 7 fen, consume warm away from meals.

    Jin Shui Liu Jun Jian: This remedy treats postpartum exterior disorders leading to cough.

    • Use:
      • Angelica: 2 qian
      • Poria: 2 qian
      • Pinellia: 2 qian
      • Cooked Rehmannia: 3-5 qian
      • Dried Tangerine Peel: 1.5 qian
      • Honey-fried Licorice: 1 qian
    • Prepare with 2 sheng of water, add 3-5-7 slices of fresh ginger, boil down to 7 fen, consume warm away from meals.

    Liu An Jian: This remedy treats postpartum cold evil entering the channels, with a full qi or obstructed qi when there is no deficiency.

    • Use:
      • Dried Tangerine Peel: 1.5 qian
      • Almonds (peeled, cut): 1 qian
      • Licorice: 1 qian
      • Pinellia: 2-3 qian
      • White Mustard Seed: 0.5-0.7 qian (not for the elderly or weak)
      • Poria: 2 qian
    • Prepare with 1.5 sheng of water, adding 3-5-7 slices of fresh ginger, boil down to 7 fen, consume away from meals.

    Tong Yu Jian: This remedy treats postpartum blood stasis with severe pain.

    • Use:
      • Tail of Angelica: 3-5 qian
      • Yellow Gardenia: 2 qian
      • Cyperus: 2 qian
      • Safflower (fried): 2 qian
      • Lindera: 1-2 qian
      • Alisma: 0.5 qian
      • Green Tangerine Peel: 0.5 qian
      • Wood Fragrance: 0.7 qian
    • Prepare with 2 sheng of water, boil down to 7 fen, add 1-2 small sheng of wine, consume before meals.[252p]

    回生丹　治妇人产后诸疾，污秽未净，及一切实邪疼痛，死胎瘀血，冲逆等证。　　人参　白朮　青皮　木瓜各三钱　延胡索　当归　川芎　苍朮　香附童便炒　赤茯苓　蒲黄　桃仁泥　熟地各一两　牛膝　山茱萸　三棱　五灵脂　地榆　甘草　羌活　陈皮　白芍各五钱　良姜四钱　乌药二两半　木香　乳香　没药各一钱　　右为末，用大黄膏为丸弹子大，金箔为衣，不拘时，随证择用汤引送下一丸。
    　　大黄膏法
    　　苏木三两，河水五碗煎，去滓　红花三两，炒黄色，用好酒一大壶，煮十余滚，去滓　黑豆三升，煮熟，存汁三碗，去豆皮晒干为末　大黄一斤　　为末，用好酢八碗，熬成膏，次下红花酒、苏木汤、黑豆汁搅匀，又熬成膏，盆内收盛候用，将锅焦焙干为末，同豆皮末俱入之。
    　　断产方　神效不伤人。
    　　四物汤五钱　芸薹子二钱
    　　右于经行后，空心温服。

    　　　　单方[253p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[253p]

    Huaisheng Dan

    Treats various ailments of women after childbirth, including uncleanliness, all kinds of painful afflictions, retained dead fetus and blood clots, and other related symptoms.

    Ingredients:

    • Ginseng: 3 qian
    • Atractylodes Macrocephala: 3 qian
    • Green Tangerine Peel: 3 qian
    • Papaya: 3 qian
    • Corydalis: 1 liang
    • Angelica Sinensis: 1 liang
    • Chuanxiong: 1 liang
    • Cangzhu: 1 liang
    • Cyperus: 5 qian
    • Red Poria: 1 liang
    • Cattail Pollen: 5 qian
    • Peach Kernel Paste: 1 liang
    • Rehmannia: 1 liang
    • Achyranthes: 5 qian
    • Cornus: 5 qian
    • Spherical Gleditsia: 5 qian
    • Licorice: 5 qian
    • Qianghuo: 5 qian
    • Aged Tangerine Peel: 5 qian
    • White Peony: 5 qian
    • Galangal: 4 qian
    • Lindera: 2.5 liang
    • Mu Xiang: 1 qian
    • Frankincense: 1 qian
    • Myrrh: 1 qian

    Grind these ingredients into powder, use Da Huang Gao to create pills the size of a marble, cover with gold leaf, and take as needed, utilizing different decoctions according to symptoms.

    Da Huang Gao Method

    • 3 liang of Sumu, boil with 5 bowls of river water, strain.
    • 3 liang of safflower, fry until yellow, then use a large pot of good wine, boil for about ten rounds, strain.
    • 3 sheng of black beans, cook until soft, retain 3 bowls of juice, dry and grind the skins into powder.
    • 1 jin of Da Huang, grind to powder, mix with 8 bowls of good vinegar, boil until it turns into a paste. Then add safflower wine, Sumu soup, and black bean juice to mix well, and boil again to form a paste. Store in a bowl for use, and dry the remaining potash with the bean skin powder.

    Discontinue Childbirth Formula - Highly effective and harmless.

    • 5 qian of Siwu Decoction
    • 2 qian of turnip seeds

    Take this mixture warm on an empty stomach after menstruation.

    Single Prescription[253p]

    产后血运风痉，身强直，口目喎斜，不知人：鸡子三个取清，调荆芥末二钱，日二服，或一枚亦可。
    　　产后恶血冲心，或胎衣不下，腹中成块：大黄一两为末，酢半升，同熬成膏，丸如梧子大，以温酢化五丸服之，良久，血下即愈。
    　　产后血运：用松烟墨二钱，烧通红，窨灭为末，酢汤或温酒调服半匕。 【《准绳》，下同】
    　　产后血运，全不省人事，极危殆者：用韭菜入有嘴磁瓶内煎热，酢沃之，便密扎瓶口，以瓶嘴向产妇鼻孔，令酢气透人，妙。　　又方：用半夏为末，丸如大豆，内鼻中即苏。亦疗五绝。　　又方：恶血服少许良。

    　　恶露不下，用好墨酢淬末，以童便酒下，妙。
    　　产后泄血不止，及腹痛胸膈闷：以姜黄为末，酒服方寸匕，日三四服。
    　　产后血块痛，用山楂浓煎汁，入沙糖少许，再煎热服。
    　　儿枕痛：用真蒲黄研细，酒调服二钱；如燥渴者新汲水调下。　　又方：用隔年蟹壳烧灰酒调下。[254p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[254p]

    After childbirth, if there is blood flow with wind and convulsions, resulting in a stiff body, distorted mouth and eyes, and unawareness of one’s surroundings: take three chicken eggs and mix with two qian of artemisia and mustard, to be taken twice daily, or a single egg may suffice.

    If there is a surge of lochia that impacts the heart, or if the placenta fails to be expelled, forming lumps in the abdomen: take one liang of rhubarb ground into powder, mix with half a sheng of vinegar, and boil into a paste. Form into pills the size of a wok seed, take five of these dissolved in warm vinegar, and after some time, blood will descend and healing occurs.

    For blood flow after childbirth, when the patient completely loses consciousness and is in a critical state: place garlic into a heated magnetic bottle, mix with vinegar, seal the bottle tightly, and direct the bottle's spout towards the mother’s nostrils, allowing the vinegar vapor to enter; this is effective. Another method: use half summer accosting ground into powder, form pills the size of soybeans, and place them in the nostrils to revive. This also treats five rare ailments. Another method: take a small amount of bad blood and consume it.

    If the lochia does not expel, use good ink and vinegar to create a powder, and take it with children's urine wine; this is effective.

    For continuous bleeding after childbirth, along with abdominal pain and chest tightness: take ground turmeric, consuming a thumb-sized portion with wine, three to four times daily.

    For pain caused by blood clots, use a strong decoction of hawthorn juice, add a small amount of sand sugar, and reheat for consumption.

    For pain at the back of the head: use real cattail pollen, finely ground, and take two qian mixed with wine; if experiencing thirst, adjust with freshly drawn water. Another method: burn crab shells from the previous year into ash and take with wine.[254p]

    产后恶露不尽，腹胀痛；用乱发如鸡子大，灰水洗垢净，烧存性，末之，酒调服二钱。　　又方：用铁秤锤烧赤，投五升酒中，用此酒煮当归三两，取二升，去滓，分温再服。
    　　产后肠中痒不可忍，以针线袋安所卧褥下，勿令人知。　　又方：取箭干及镞，安所卧席下，勿令产妇知。
    　　产后余血冲心，烦闷腹痛：同蒲黄不拘多少，隔纸炒，每服一钱，东流水煎汤调下。　　又方：用陈白梅捶碎煎汤饮。

    　　产后中风烦渴：用莲心生为细末，米饮调下二钱效。
    　　产后血气暴虚汗出：淡竹叶煎汤服之，一服三合，须臾再服。　　又方：用马齿苋研取汁三大合，煮一沸，投蜜匙许，停冷顿服。无新者用干，煮汁入蜜服。
    　　产后发热烦渴：生藕汁一升，合生地汁妙。 【《本草》】　　又方：竹沥饮一杯，甚妙。 【丹溪】　　又方：妇人月经水饮之甚妙。 【俗方】
    　　妇人产后腹痛：取户限下土，热酒服一钱。 【《本草》】[255p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[255p]

    After childbirth, if lochia does not cease, and there is abdominal swelling and pain: use rough hair, the size of a chicken egg, wash it in ash water to clean, burn it to preserve its essence, grind it into powder, and take two qian mixed with wine.

    Another remedy: burn an iron pestle until red, toss it into five sheng of wine, use this wine to boil three liang of angelica, take two sheng, remove the dregs, and take it warm in divided doses.

    If there is unbearable itching in the intestines after childbirth: place a needle and thread bag under the mattress, keeping it secret. Another remedy: take arrow shafts and tips, place them under the bedding, and keep it unknown to the woman.

    If after childbirth stagnant blood rushes to the heart, causing irritability and abdominal pain: take any amount of equal parts of pu huang, fry it between paper, take one qian each time and brew a decoction with Eastern flowing water for consumption. Another remedy: use aged white plum, pound it and brew as a drink.

    Postpartum wind and thirst: take the heart of lotus seeds, grind it into fine powder, and take two qian mixed with rice drink.

    Postpartum blood and qi are greatly deficient with sweating: brew bamboo leaves, take one serving of three he, and after a moment take it again. Another remedy: use purslane juice, take three large he, boil it briefly, add a spoonful of honey, and let it cool before drinking. If not fresh, use dried, boil the juice and mix with honey.

    Postpartum fever and thirst: one sheng of fresh lotus juice combined with fresh prepared rhemannia juice is excellent. Another remedy: a cup of bamboo sap drink is very effective. Another remedy: for women, drinking menstrual water is also excellent.

    For abdominal pain after childbirth: take soil from beneath the door, mix with hot wine and take one qian.[255p]

    产后忽昏闷不省人事者，暴虚故也：生鸡卵三枚吞之。若未醒，童便一升饮之。又不醒，竹沥五合，日三五次即苏。因以半夏末或皂角末吹鼻中令嚏。【《良方》】
    　　产后衄血血崩：取木耳一斤或半斤，烧灰存性为末，入麝香末一钱，熄枳壳末二钱和匀，每取一钱，以乌梅煎汤调下即止。【丹溪】　　又方：急取绯线一条，并产母顶心发两条，紧系产母手中指节即止。 【《良方》】
    　　产肠不收：以大纸捻蘸香油点灯吹灭，以烟熏产母鼻中，肠即上矣。　　又方：肠出，盛以洁净漆器，浓煎黄芪汤浸之，肠即上。
    　　产肠不收：用油五斤炼熟盆盛，令妇坐盆中，约一食时，先用皂角炙去皮研末，吹少许入鼻，作嚏立上。【《斗门方》】　　又方：五灵脂烧烟熏之，先以盐汤洗净。 【危氏方】
    　　产后血冲，心胸满喘，命在须臾：用血竭、没药各一钱，研细末，童便和，酒调服。 【《集要》】[256p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[256p]

    After childbirth, if a woman suddenly becomes melancholy and unresponsive, it is due to a deficiency: swallow three eggs of a hen. If she has not regained consciousness, give her one liter of young boys' urine to drink. If she still does not awaken, take five cups of bamboo extract and administer it three to five times a day until she recovers. Additionally, use powdered banxia or soapberry to blow into her nostrils to induce sneezing.

    For postpartum bleeding: take half to one pound of wood ear fungus, burn it to ash, then grind it into a fine powder. Mix it with one qian of musk powder and two qian of prepared orange peel powder. Take one qian of this mixture and dissolve it in a decoction of black plum to stop the bleeding. Another remedy: urgently take a thread of red silk along with two strands of hair from the woman’s crown, tightly tie it around the middle joint of her index finger to stop the bleeding.

    For uncontracted intestines after childbirth: use a large piece of paper twisted, dip it in fragrant oil, light it, then blow it out, using the smoke to waft into the woman's nostrils, and the intestines will retract. Another remedy: If the intestines protrude, place them in a clean lacquer container and immerse in a strong decoction of astragalus; the intestines will retract.

    For uncontracted intestines: use five pounds of oil heated in a basin, have the woman sit in the basin for about a meal's time, then first use soapberry dried and ground to powder, blowing a small amount into her nostrils to induce sneezing, which will help retract the intestines. Another remedy: use five-spirit wax and burn it to create smoke after washing it clean with salt water.

    For postpartum blood rush causing suffocation and an urgent situation: use one qian each of couperose and myrrh, grind into a fine powder, mix with young boys’ urine and wine to take.[256p]

    产后肠出不收：枳壳煎汤浸之，良久即入也。 【《袖珍方》】
    　　产肠脱出：羌活二两煎，酒服。 【《子母秘录》】　　又方：樗枝取皮焙干一握，水五升，连根葱五茎，汉椒一撮，同煎至三升，去滓，倾盆内，乘热熏洗，冷则再热。一服可作五次用。洗后睡少时。忌盐酢酱面发风毒物，及用心劳力等事。年深者亦治之。【《妇人良方》】　　又方：用石蒜 【即酸头草】 一把，以水三碗，煎一碗半，去滓熏洗，神效。 【《得效方》】　　又方：用皂角树皮半斤，皂角核一合，川楝树皮半斤，石莲子炒去心一合为粗末，以水煎汤乘热，以物围之，坐熏洗之，挹干，便吃补气丸药一服，仰睡。【《本草》】　　又方：五倍子末掺之，或以五倍子、白矾煎汤熏洗。 【《妇人良方》】　　又方：全蝎炒研末，口噙水鼻中(口畜)之，立效。【《卫生宝鉴》】[257p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[257p]

    After childbirth, if there is intestinal prolapse: soak with a decoction of bitter orange; it will soon return.

    For displaced intestines: take two taels of Qianghuo and decoct it with alcohol to consume. Another recipe: take a handful of the bark of Ailanthus, dry it, boil it with five liters of water, five stalks of green onion, and a pinch of Chinese pepper until it reduces to three liters. Strain, pour into a basin, and use the hot steam to wash, reheating if it cools. One preparation can be used five times. After washing, rest for a short time. Avoid salty, sour, or strong-smelling foods, as well as overexertion. This can also be treated for chronic cases.

    Another recipe: use a handful of stone lily (Suan Tou Cao), boil with three bowls of water until reduced to one and a half bowls, strain, and steam wash for great effect.

    Another recipe: take half a jin of soapberry bark, one portion of soapberry seeds, half a jin of Chinese chinaberry bark, and one portion of roasted stone lotus seeds ground to a coarse powder. Boil in water, use the hot infusion, surround the affected area with it, sit and steam wash, dry, and then consume an energy replenishing herbal pill while lying on your back.

    Another recipe: mix powdered galls, or use galls and alum in a decoction for steam washing.

    Another recipe: fry and grind the whole scorpion to powder, hold in the mouth and inhale through the nose for immediate effect.[257p]

    子宫脱下：萞麻子仁、枯矾等分为末，安纸上托入；仍以萞麻子仁十四枚研膏，涂顶心即入。盘肠生产方同。【《摘元方》】
    　　子宫不收，名瘣疾，痛不可忍：用慈石酒浸煅研末米糊丸梧子大，每卧时，滑石汤下四十丸；次早用慈石散，米汤服二钱。散用慈石酒浸半两，铁扮二钱半，当归五钱为末。【《机要》】
    　　产后瘀血不尽：麻子仁五升，酒一升，浸一夜，明旦去滓，温服一升，不瘥，再服一升，不吐不下。不得与男子通。一月，将养如初。【《千金》】
    　　堕胎下血不止：榆白皮、当归焙各半两，入生姜，水煎服之。 【《普济方》】　　又方：炙桑白皮煮水饮之。 【《肘后方》，下同。】
    　　血露不绝：锯截桑根取屑五指撮，以醇酒服之，日三服。
    　　产后血运闷绝：红花一两，酒二盏，煎至一盏，分二服。如口噤，斡开灌之，立效。 【《十三方》】　　又方：用红花新者三两，无灰酒童便各半升，煮取一盏服。[258p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[258p]

    Translation of the Classical Chinese Text:

    For a prolapsed uterus: Grind a mixture of catechu and hemp seeds into powder and place them on paper; then grind fourteen seeds of hemp into a paste and apply it at the crown of the head before insertion. The same method applies for birthing with conformity to the bowels.

    If the uterus does not retract, it is called “sore disease,” and the pain is unbearable: Soak lychee stone in wine, calcine, grind into powder, and form into pills the size of a walnut. Take forty pills with talc soup every night; on the following morning, use a mixture of lychee stone powder and rice soup, taking two coins worth. For the powder, soak half an ounce of lychee stone in wine, half an ounce of iron, and five ounces of angelica and grind into powder.

    For postpartum blood that does not cease: Take five liters of hemp seeds and one liter of wine; soak overnight, discard the residue, and take one liter warm. If not healed, take another liter—do not vomit or down it. Avoid contact with men. Repose as before for a month.

    For continuous bleeding after a miscarriage: Use half an ounce each of white mulberry bark and angelica root, add fresh ginger, boil with water, and take as a decoction.

    Another method: Roast white mulberry bark and drink as a decoction.

    For continuous blood flow: Saw off the roots of mulberry and take a handful of shavings with strong wine, taking three doses daily.

    For blocked blood circulation postpartum: One ounce of safflower in two wine cups, decoct until one cup remains, divide into two doses. If the mouth is obstructed, administer forcibly to ensure immediate effect.

    Another formulation: Use three ounces of fresh safflower, half a liter each of unburned wine and urine, boil to obtain one cup and consume.[258p]

    产后血运，及恶血冲心，或儿枕痛欲绝：月起胡索为末，酒服一钱，立止。 【《得效方》】
    　　堕胎下血不止：当归焙一两，葱白一握，每服五钱，酒一盏半，煎八分，温服。 【《总录》】
    　　下胎或产后，血气上冲，心痛欲死：郁金烧存性为末二钱，米酢一呷，调灌即苏。
    　　产后血运，狂言失志：用紫绯一两为末，酒服二钱匕。 【《家传方》】
    　　堕胎下血不止：代赭石末一钱，生地黄汁半盏，调服，日三五次，以瘥为度。 【《本草》】
    　　产后血运，及恶露不下，痛闷欲死：苏木一两銼，酒水煎服。　　一方：如无苏木，取绯衣煮汁饮之，亦得。
    　　产后血瘕痛：取鲤鱼鳞烧灰研，酒服一钱，能破滞血。
    　　小产下血过多而心痛者：取鰞鲗鱼腹内墨炒为末，酢汤调下。 【《妇人良方》】[259p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[259p]

    After childbirth, if there is blood circulation and evil blood rushing to the heart, or if the child has severe pain in the occiput: grind Hu Suo when the moon is full into powder, take one qian with wine, and it will stop immediately.

    If there is continuous bleeding after abortion: prepare one liang of prepared Donggui and a handful of green onion, take five qian with one and a half cups of wine, simmer down to eight parts, and take warm.

    After childbirth, if blood and qi surge upward causing heart pain: burn Yin JIn to retain its essence, powder two qian, take with a sip of rice vinegar, and it will revive.

    After childbirth, if there is blood circulation and wild words indicating lost spirit: take one liang of purple-mauve powder, and take two qian with wine.

    If there is continuous bleeding after abortion: take one qian of Dai Zhe Shi powder, mix with half a cup of fresh Rehmannia juice, and take three to five times a day until recovery.

    After childbirth, if there is blood flow and lochia not discharged, causing severe pain: shave one liang of Su Mu and decoct in wine, or if Su Mu is unavailable, use the juice of a red garment to drink.

    For postpartum blood stagnation and pain: take fish scales from a carp, burn to ash and grind, take one qian with wine, it can break up stagnant blood.

    If there is excessive bleeding after a miscarriage with heart pain: take the ink found inside a fish (Platycephalus), fry it to powder, and mix it with vinegar soup.[259p]

    产后血结腹痛，或因产瘦瘠，血气积聚，可煮淡菜，久食之。
    　　产后血闷攻心欲死，产难胞衣不出：捣慈姑汁服一升。又下石淋。
    　　产后血不下：锅底墨烟，热酒服之。 【《生生编》】
    　　产后尿血：川牛膝水煎，顿服。 【《补遗》】
    　　产后下血：紫菀末，水服五钱。 【《圣惠》】
    　　产后崩中下血不止：菖蒲一两半，酒二盏，煎取一盏，去滓，分三服，食前温服之。
    　　堕胎腹痛，血出不止：羚羊角烧灰三钱，豆淋酒下。 【《普济》】　　又方：鹿角烧研，豉汁服方寸匕，日二服。 【《子母秘录》】　　又方：乌鸡子三枚，酢半升，酒二升和搅，煮取一升，分四服。 【《拾遗》】
    　　产后泻血不止：干艾叶半两，炙熟，老生姜半两，浓煎汤，一服立效。 【《本草》】
    　　产后下血不止，羸瘦迨死，并血风等证：蒲黄二两，水二升，煎八合，顿服。 【《产宝方》】[260p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[260p]

    After childbirth, if there's blood stagnation causing abdominal pain, or if the mother is weak and blood and qi have accumulated, one can boil and consume seaweed over a long period.

    If there's a feeling of blood discomfort attacking the heart, potentially leading to death, and the afterbirth does not expel: crush the juice of the arrowhead plant and take one liter. Also, take some stone powder.

    If blood does not flow after childbirth: take soot from the bottom of a pot and drink with hot wine.

    If there's blood in the urine after childbirth: prepare water decoction of Chinese angelica and take it immediately.

    If there's blood loss post-delivery: consume five qian (weight unit) of purple aster powder with water.

    If there is unceasing blood loss after childbirth: take one and a half liang of calamus, two cups of wine, boil to obtain one cup, strain, and divide into three servings, taking warm before meals.

    For abdominal pain and continuous bleeding following a miscarriage: burn three qian of antelope horn to ash and take with bean juice. Another method: burn and grind deer antler, take with a small spoonful of fermented liquid twice a day. Yet another method: take three black chicken eggs, half a liter of vinegar, and two liters of wine, mix and boil down to one liter, dividing into four servings.

    For continuous blood loss after childbirth: half a liang of dried mugwort leaves, roasted until cooked, and half a liang of old ginger, boiled into a strong soup, will act immediately.

    If there's persistent blood loss after childbirth, leading to emaciation and potential death, along with symptoms of blood wind: take two liang of cattail pollen, with two liters of water, boil down to eight portions, and take in one go.[260p]

    产后血崩：莲蓬壳五个，香附二两，各烧存性为末，每服二钱，米饮下，日二服。 【《妇人良方》】
    　　堕胎下血不止：桑木中蠹虫烧末，酒服方寸匕，日二服。虫屎方可。 【《普济》】　　又方：地黄捣末，每食前热酒服一钱，连进三服。 【《瑞竹堂方》】
    　　落胎下血：丹参十二两，酒五升，煮取三升，温酒一升，一日三服，亦可水煮之。 【《千金》】
    　　产后血多：山漆研末，米汤下。 【《集简方》】
    　　产后血运，心闷气绝，以丈夫小便研浓墨一升，服。 【《子母秘录》】
    　　产后狂言血运，烦渴不止：生姜、香附子去毛为未，每服二钱，姜枣水煎服。 【《集验方》】
    　　产后血运，心气欲绝，益母草研汁，服一盏绝妙。 【《子母秘录》】
    　　产后血闭不下者：益母草汁一小盏，入酒一合，煎服。 【《圣惠》，下同】　　又方，搅匀温服。

    　　产后崩中，血运，卒下血：酢磨松烟古墨服之。 【《本草》】[261p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[261p]

    Postpartum hemorrhage: Five lotus seed pods and two taels of cyperus rhizome, burned and made into a powder. Take two qian with rice wine, twice daily.

    For continuous bleeding after miscarriage: Burn the wood-boring worm from mulberry trees into powder, take a pinch with wine, twice daily. Worm excrement is acceptable. Another remedy: Grind rehmannia into powder, take one qian with hot wine before meals, for three doses.

    For bleeding after a miscarriage: Twelve taels of salvia miltiorrhiza, five sheng of wine, boil down to three sheng, take one sheng warm, three times a day; can also be boiled with water.

    For excessive bleeding after childbirth: Grind mountain lacquer into powder, take with rice soup.

    For postpartum bleeding, with heart heaviness and breathlessness: Use one sheng of strong ink made from the husband's urine.

    For wild talk and unceasing thirst after childbirth: Use ginger and cyperus rhizome (feather removed), each take two qian, boiled with ginger and jujube water.

    For bleeding after childbirth, with heart qi nearly failing: Grind motherwort into juice, take one small cup for exceptional effect.

    For blockage after childbirth: One small cup of motherwort juice mixed with one part wine, decoct and take.

    Another remedy: Stir well and take warm.

    During postpartum bleeding, with sudden blood loss: Take vinegar-ground pine smoke and ancient ink.[261p]

    堕胎血溢不止：墨三两，火烧酢淬三次，出火毒，没药一两为末，每服二钱，酢汤下。【《普济》】
    　　产后血运：鳔胶烧存性，酒和黄子小便调服三五钱，良。 【事林。】　　又方：案纸三十张、烧灰，清酒半升，和服顿定，冬月用暖酒服，立效。 【《传信方》】　　又方：取酽酢和产妇血如枣大服之。 【《圣惠》】
    　　产后血运不知人及狂语：用麒麟竭一两，研末，每服二钱，温酒调下。 【《圣惠》】　　又方：人参一两，紫苏半两，以童尿酒水三合煎服。 【《摘要》】　　又方：用荷叶、缸花、姜黄等分炒，研末，童子小便调服二钱。 【庞安常《伤寒论》】
    　　产后血运筑心眼倒，风缩欲死者：取干荆芥穗捣筛末，每用二钱匕，童子小便一盏调匀热服，立效。口噤者，挑齿灌。口闭者，灌鼻中，皆效。【《本草》】
    　　产后鼻衄：荆芥穗研末，童子小便，服二钱，海上方也。 【《妇人良方》】[262p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[262p]

    • For excessive bleeding after abortion: Mix three to two parts of ink, burn with vinegar three times, extract the essence, then powder one part myrrh. Take two qian with vinegar soup.

    • For postpartum blood circulation issues: Use fish bladder glue prepared, mix with yellow egg and urine, taking three to five qian. It works well. Additionally: Use thirty sheets of paper, burn to ash, mix with half a liter of clear wine, take a dose quickly. In winter, use warm wine for immediate effect.

    • Another prescription: Take strong vinegar and mix it with the blood of the mother to form pills the size of jujubes.

    • For postpartum bleeding causing confusion or babbling: Use one part of qilinjie, grind to powder, take two qian with warm wine. Another method: Use one part ginseng, half part purple perilla, and boil with three parts of child urine mixed with wine.

    • Another recipe: Use equal parts of lotus leaves, flowering cress, and turmeric, fry, grind to powder, and mix with two qian of child urine for administration.

    • For severe postpartum bleeding causing fainting or desire to die: Take dried jingjie spikes and pound to powder. Use two qian with one cup of warm child urine for immediate effect. For those with a closed mouth, insert a toothpick and feed them. For completely closed mouths, use nasal feeding; both are effective.

    • For postpartum nasal bleeding: Grind jingjie spikes to powder, mix with child urine, and take two qian; this is also a remedy from the sea.[262p]

    产后血病：庵(艹闾)子一两，水一升，童子小便二盏，煎饮。【《集简方》】
    　　产后血运，心闷烦热：用接骨童 【即蒴藋】 如算子一握，水一升。煎半升，分二服。或小便出血者，服之亦瘥。【《易简方》】
    　　产后恶露不除：续骨木二十两，銼，水一斗，煮三升，分三服即下。即蒴藋也。　　又方：以升麻三两，清酒五升，煮取二升，分半再服，当吐下恶物，极良。 【《千金翼方》】
    　　产后秽污不尽，腹满心头硬，或寒热不禁，或心闷手足烦热，气力欲绝诸病：并用延胡索炒研，酒服二钱，甚效。【《圣惠》，下同。】
    　　产后血运：芸薹子、生地黄等分为末，每服三钱，姜七片，酒水各半盏，童便半盏，煎七分，温服即苏。　　又方：鹿角一段烧存性，出火毒为末，酒调灌下，即苏。 【《摘要》】
    　　产后血运不知人及狂语：用血竭半两研末，每服二钱，温酒调下。 【《本草》】[263p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[263p]

    Postpartum blood ailments: One or two liang of Anzi (caltrop fruit), one sheng of water, and two chuan of a boy's urine, boil to drink. 【"Collection of Simple Formulas"】

    Postpartum blood flow, with feelings of heaviness and heat: Use the bone-setting herb, like a handful of it, with one sheng of water. Boil down to half a sheng, divide into two doses. If experiencing bleeding with urine, taking this also brings relief. 【"Easy Simple Formulas"】

    Postpartum lochia not cleared: Twenty liang of continued bone wood, shredded, one dou of water, boil down to three sheng, divide into three doses for expulsion. This is the same as the bone-setting herb. Another method: Use three liang of cough grass, five sheng of clear wine, boil down to two sheng, divide and take in two doses. This will expel the evil items, very effective. 【"Thousand Gold Wing Formulas"】

    Postpartum filth not fully expelled, with fullness in the abdomen and hardness in the chest, or alternating cold and heat, or feelings of heaviness and heat in hands and feet, with energy almost depleted: Use炒 and ground Yanhusuo, take two qian with wine, very effective. 【"Holy Benefits," same below.】

    Postpartum blood flow: Grind equal parts of rapeseed and raw Rehmannia into powder, take three qian each time, with seven slices of ginger, half a cup each of wine and water, and half a cup of boy's urine, boil to seven parts, take warm for recovery. Another method: Burn a piece of deer antler to preserve its essence, grind to powder, mix with wine and take, for recovery. 【"Summary"】

    Postpartum blood flow with delirium and incoherent speech: Use half a liang of blood-resoling herb, grind to powder, take two qian with warm wine. 【"Materia Medica"】[263p]

    血气逆烦，羚羊角烧为末，水服方寸匕。 【《肘后方》】
    　　产后血乱奔入四肢厥逆：以狗头骨锻灰，酒服二钱，甚效。 【《经验方》】
    　　产后虚羸腹痛，冷气不调，及脑中风，汗自出：白羊肉一斤切，治如常。调和食之。 【《心镜》】
    　　产后血运：神曲炒为末，水服方寸匕。 【《千金》】
    　　产后诸疾：血运心闷烦热，厌厌气欲绝，心头硬，乍寒乍热：续断皮一握，水三升，煎二升，分三服，如人行三里再服，无所忌。此药救产后垂死。【《子母秘录》】
    　　产后心腹痛闷，或单心痛，恶血不尽也：荷叶炒香为末，每服方寸匕，沸汤或童子小便调下，或烧灰或煎汁皆可。【《救急方》】
    　　产后心痛，恶血攻心，气闷欲绝：桂心为末，狗胆汁丸芡子大，每热酒服一丸。 【《圣惠》】
    　　产后瘕痛：桂末服方寸匕，取效。 【《肘后方》】
    　　产后腹痛如绞：当归末五钱，白蜜一合，水一盏，煎一盏，分为二服，未效再服。[264p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[264p]

    1. When blood and qi are disturbed, burn antelope horn to a powder and take a small amount in water.
    2. After childbirth, if blood rushes chaotically into the limbs causing reversals: grind a dog's skull into ash, take two qian with wine, and it is very effective.
    3. Postpartum weakness and abdominal pain, with cold qi out of balance, and sudden wind in the head, with spontaneous sweating: take one pound of lamb, cut it up, and cook as usual. Adjust and eat.
    4. For postpartum blood circulation: grind shenqu to a powder and take a small amount in water.
    5. Various ailments after childbirth: if blood circulation causes heart disturbance, irritability, and a feeling of heat, along with stiffness in the heart, alternating between cold and heat: take a handful of Xu Duan and boil it in three liters of water down to two liters, divide into three doses, and take after walking three miles, with no restrictions on food. This medicine is life-saving after childbirth.
    6. For postpartum chest and abdominal pain or single heart pain with incomplete expulsion of lochia: grind fragrant lotus leaves into a powder and take a small amount, mixing it with hot soup or young boy's urine, or use it as ash or decoction, all are acceptable.
    7. After childbirth, if there is heart pain with evil blood attacking the heart and a feeling of suffocation: grind cinnamon bark to a powder, mix with dog gall juice in pearl-sized pills, and take one with hot wine.
    8. For postpartum gynaecological pain: take a small amount of ground cinnamon powder, and it will work.
    9. For postpartum abdominal pain like cramping: take five qian of angelica powder, one he of white honey, and one cup of water, decoct to one cup, divide into two doses, and if not effective, take again.[264p]

    产后血痛：白鸡冠花酒煎服之。 【《李楼奇方》】
    　　产后腹痛欲死，因感寒起者：陈蕲艾二斤焙干，捣铺脐上，以绢覆住，熨斗熨之，待口中艾气出，则痛自止矣。【《经验方》】　　又方：羌活二两，煎酒服。 【《必效方》】
    　　产后心痛：鸡子煮酒食之。 【《备急方》】
    　　产后腹痛如锥剌者：败酱草五两，水四升，煮二升，每服二合，日三服良。
    　　儿枕痛百药不效者：用螃蟹一个，烧存性，研为末，空心，温酒一盏调服，立止。生男用尖脐蟹，生女用团脐蟹。【《本草》，下同】　　又方：用螃蟹捣烂和酒服。

    　　产后烦渴，血气上冲也：紫葛三两，水三升，煎一升，去滓呷之。
    　　产后腹痛，儿枕痛也：天仙藤五两，炒焦为末，每服生姜汁、童子小便和细酒服。 【《经验方》】
    　　产后儿枕血瘕，腹痛，喉痹热塞：铁秤锤或铁斧铁杵烧赤，淬酒饮之。[265p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[265p]

    Postpartum blood pain: Take white cock's comb flower wine decoction.

    Postpartum abdominal pain that causes extreme discomfort due to cold: Dry two pounds of aged mugwort, pound it and place it on the navel, cover with silk, and use a hot iron to apply heat. Once the mugwort's vapors are released into the mouth, the pain will naturally stop. Another remedy: Two taels of notopterygium, decocted and taken with wine.

    Postpartum heart pain: Consume boiled eggs with wine.

    Postpartum abdominal pain that feels like stabbing: Five taels of saposhnikovia, four liters of water, boil down to two liters, taking two bu each time, three times a day is beneficial.

    For persistent infant head pain that does not respond to medications: Use one crab, burn it to preserve its essence, grind it into powder, take on an empty stomach mixed with warm wine, and it will stop immediately. Use sharp-navel crab for boys and round-navel crab for girls. Another remedy: Pound the crab and mix it with wine.

    For postpartum thirst due to rising blood and qi: Three taels of purple yam, three liters of water, boil down to one liter, strain and drink.

    For postpartum abdominal pain and infant head pain: Five taels of heavenly immortals vine, fry until charred and powdered, take with fresh ginger juice, juvenile urine, and fine wine.

    For postpartum blood lumps in the infant's head, abdominal pain, and sore throat with heat and obstruction: Heat a heavy iron hammer or iron axe until red, then quench it in wine and drink.[265p]

    产后咳逆呕吐，心忡目运：石莲子一两半，白茯苓一两，丁香五钱为末，每米饮服二钱。【《补遗》】
    　　产后闷乱，血气上冲，口干腹痛：用坐藕汁三升饮之。　　又方：用藕汁、生地黄汁、童子小便等分煎服。
    　　妇人产后：血气攻心痛，恶物不下：用灶中心土研末，酒服二钱，泻出恶物，立效。 【《急救方》】
    　　产后浮肿：用柑皮酒煎服之。雷公云：产后肌浮，柑皮酒服是也。 【《本草》，下同】
    　　产后风虚：独活、白藓皮各三两，水三升，煮一升，分三服。耐酒者，入酒同煮。
    　　产后血渗入大小肠：车前草汁一升，入蜜一合，和煎一沸，分二服。 【《崔氏方》】
    　　产后泻痢：小龙牙根一握，浓煎服之，甚效。即蛇含草是也。 【《斗门方》】
    　　堕胎血瘀不下，狂闷寒热：用鹿角屑一两为末，豉汤服一钱，日三，须臾血下。 【《圣惠》】　　又方，蒲黄三两，水三升，煎一升，顿服。 【《梅师方》，下同】[266p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[266p]

    Postpartum cough with vomiting and palpitations: Take one and a half taels of stone lotus seeds, one tael of white poria, and five qian of cloves, ground into a powder. Take two qian with rice wine.

    Postpartum restlessness with upward rushing of blood and qi, dry mouth, and abdominal pain: Drink three sheng of lotus root juice. Another recipe: Use equal parts of lotus root juice, raw rehmannia juice, and young boy’s urine, decoct and take.

    For women postpartum experiencing heart pain due to attacking blood and qi, with bad substances not being expelled: Grind soil from the center of the stove into a powder, take two qian with wine; this will expel bad substances immediately.

    Postpartum edema: Using tangerine peel wine to decoct and take. Lei Gong states that for postpartum swelling, drinking tangerine peel wine is effective.

    Postpartum wind deficiency: Take three taels of bushclover and white huai bark, with three sheng of water, boil down to one sheng and divide into three doses. For those who can endure alcohol, cook with wine.

    For postpartum blood leaking into the intestines: One sheng of plantain juice, mix with one he of honey, decoct until boiling, and divide into two doses.

    Postpartum diarrhea: A handful of dragon tooth root, decoct and take, this is quite effective. This is the same as snake-wrapped grass.

    For retained blood and clots from miscarriage with agitation, cold, and heat: Use one tael of deer antler shavings, ground into a powder, take one qian with fermented bean soup, three times a day, and blood will flow shortly.

    Another recipe: Three taels of cattail pollen, three sheng of water, decoct until one sheng is obtained and take in one sitting.[266p]

    儿枕血瘕：蒲黄三钱，米饮服或白汤下。
    　　产后阴脱：慎火草一斤，阴干，酒五升煮汁一升，分四服。 【《子母秘录》】
    　　产后诸痢：苍耳叶捣绞汁，温服半酒盏，日三四服。 【《圣惠》】
    　　产后血胀：捣芭蕉根绞汁，温服二三合。 【《本草》】
    　　产后搐搦强直者，不可便作中风治，乃风入子脏，与破伤风同。用鳔胶一两以螺粉炒焦，去粉为末，分三服，煎蝉蜕汤下。【《产宝》】
    　　产后目闭心闷：赤小豆生研，东流水服方寸乙，不瘥更服。 【《肘后方》】
    　　产后闷满不能食：用赤小豆二七枚，烧研，冷水顿服，佳。 【《本草》】
    　　堕胎，血下烦闷：用豉一升、水三升，煮三沸，调鹿角末方寸匕。 【《子母秘录》】
    　　产后中风，血热烦渴：以红蓝子五合熬捣，旦日取半大匙，以水一升，煎取七合，去滓，细细咽之。【《广利方》】[267p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[267p]

    • For postpartum blood stasis: Use three qian of cattail pollen, take with rice wine or white broth.
    • For postpartum uterine prolapse: Use one jin of sage, dry it in the shade, add five sheng of wine and boil down to one sheng of juice, divide into four doses.
    • For postpartum diarrhea: Pound and squeeze the juice from ramie leaves, warm and take half a wine cup, three to four times a day.
    • For postpartum blood swelling: Pound banana root to extract juice, warm and take two to three he.
    • For postnatal convulsions and spasms, do not treat as a stroke, as it is a wind affecting the baby’s organs, similar to tetanus. Use one liang of fish bladder glue, roast it with snail powder until charred, discard the powder and divide into three doses, decoct in cicada slough soup.
    • For postpartum eye closure and heart distress: Grind red beans fresh, take with a small amount of water, if not healed, continue to take.
    • For postpartum fullness and inability to eat: Use twenty-seven red beans, roast and grind, take with cold water immediately, it's beneficial.
    • For abortion, blood loss, and anxiety: Use one sheng of fermented soybeans and three sheng of water, boil three times, mix with a tablespoon of deer antler powder.
    • For postpartum stroke with blood heat and thirst: Use five he of red bluestem, boil and pound, take half a large spoon with one sheng of water, boil down to seven he, strain and swallow slowly.[267p]

    堕胎下血：小蓟根叶、益母草五两，水三大碗，煮取一碗，再煎至一盏，分二服，一日服尽。【《总录》】
    　　妇人产后百病，及腹中积聚：用桃仁一千二百枚，去皮尖双仁，熬捣细末，以清酒一斗半，研如麦粥，入磁缸中，密封口，汤煮一复时，取出，温酒和服一匙，日再。名曰桃仁煎。【《正传》，下同】
    　　产后诸虚，发热自汗：人参、当归等分为末，用猪腰子一个去膜，切小片，以水三升，糯米半合，葱白二茎，煮米熟，取汁一盏，入药煎至八分，食前温服即愈。【《永类方》】
    　　产后秘塞出血多：以人参、麻子仁、枳壳麸炒为末，炼蜜丸梧子大，每服五十丸，米饮下。【《济生方》】
    　　产后口干舌缩：用鸡子一枚打破，水一盏搅服。 【《经验方》】
    　　产后烦懑不食者：白犬骨烧研，水服方寸匕。 【《千金翼》】[268p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[268p]

    • For inducing miscarriage: use five liang of Cirsium leaves and motherwort, boil with three large bowls of water until reduced to one bowl, then simmer until it reduces to one cup. Divide into two doses and take all in one day.

    • For postpartum ailments and abdominal masses: take 1,200 peach kernels, remove the skin and double kernels, pound into a fine powder. Combine with one and a half dou of clear wine, mix until it resembles porridge, place in a sealed clay jar. After boiling once, take out and mix one spoonful with warm wine to consume twice daily. This is called Peach Kernel Decoction.

    • For postpartum deficiency, fevers, and spontaneous sweating: grind equal parts ginseng and angelica, use one pig’s kidney without the membrane, cut into small pieces; with three sheng of water, half a he of glutinous rice, and two stalks of scallions, cook the rice until done, then take one cup of the broth. Add the ground herbs and simmer until reduced by a third. Take warm before meals for recovery.

    • For postpartum constipation and excessive bleeding: grind ginseng, hemp seeds, and fried bitter orange peel into powder, shape with honey into pills the size of a nut. Take fifty pills with rice wine.

    • For dry mouth and shriveled tongue after childbirth: crack one egg and mix it with one cup of water to consume.

    • For postpartum anxiety and lack of appetite: burn white dog bone to a powder, take a spoonful with water.[268p]

    产后腹胀不通，转气急、坐卧不安：以麦蘗一合为末，和酒服，良久通转，神验。
    　　产后青肿疼痛，及血气水疾：干漆、大麦糵等分为末，新瓦中铺漆一层，糵一层，重重令满，盐泥固济，毁赤研末，热酒调服二钱。产后诸疾并宜。【《经验方》】
    　　产后秘塞五七日不通，不宜妄服药丸，宜用大麦芽炒黄为末，每服三钱，沸汤调下，与粥间服。【《妇人良方》】
    　　产后诸痢：多煮薤白食，仍以羊肾脂同炒食之。 【《范汪方》】
    　　产后虚汗：猪膏、姜汁、白蜜各一升，酒五合，煎五上五下，每服方寸匕。 【《千金翼》】
    　　产后烦闷汗出，不识人：《千金》用羚羊角烧末，东流水服方寸匕，未愈再服。　　又方：加芍药、枳实等分，炒研末，汤服。
    　　产后扼逆：白豆蔻、丁香各半两研细，桃仁汤服一钱，少顷再服。 【《乾坤生意》】
    　　产后阴脱：铁炉中紫烟、羊脂二味和匀，布裹炙热熨，推内之。 【《胎产方》】[269p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[269p]

    Postpartum abdominal distension and blockage, with urgent gas and discomfort when sitting or lying: Grind one part of wheat chaff into powder, mix with wine and take; it will pass and relieve within a while.

    Postpartum blue swelling and pain, along with blood, qi, and water diseases: Mix equal parts of dried lacquer and barley flour into powder, layer lacquer and flour alternately in a new tile until full, and prepare a salt clay mixture. Grind the red residue into powder and mix with hot wine to take two qian (a unit of weight). This is suitable for various postpartum ailments.

    If there is a blockage in the bowels five to seven days postpartum, do not recklessly take pills. Instead, use roasted barley malt ground into powder and take three qian with boiling soup, alternating with porridge.

    For various postpartum dysentery: Boil and eat Chinese chives, and also stir-fry and consume with sheep kidney fat.

    For postpartum spontaneous sweating: Combine one liter each of lard and ginger juice, and 500 ml of honey, then five parts of wine are boiled five times. Each dose should be a finger-sized spoon.

    For postpartum anxiety and sweating with recognition issues: From "Thousand Golden Prescriptions," use powdered antelope horn and take one finger-sized spoon with spring water; if not healed, take again. Another formula: Add equal parts of peony and bitter orange, stir-fry and grind into powder, and take with soup.

    For postpartum rebellious qi: Grind half a liang each of white cardamom and clove into fine powder, and take one qian with peach kernel decoction, repeating after a short while.

    For postpartum uterine prolapse: In an iron stove, mix purple smoke and sheep fat uniformly; wrap in cloth and heat to press inward.[269p]

    产后下痢日五六十行：用桑木里蠹虫粪炒黄，急以水沃之，稀稠得所服之，以瘥为度。此独孤讷祭酒方也。【《必效方》】
    　　产后烦闷，乃血气上冲：生地黄汁、清酒各一升相和煎沸，分二服。 【《集验方》】
    　　产后百病：地黄汁渍曲二升，净秫米二斗，令发，如常酿之至熟，封七日，取清常食，令相接。忌生冷鲊蒜鸡猪肉一切毒物。未产，先一月酿成，夏月不可造。【《千金翼》】
    　　产后阴脱：以温水洗软，用雄鼠粪烧烟熏之，即入。 【熊氏】
    　　产后遗尿：鸡窠草烧末，酒服一钱。 【《圣惠》】
    　　产后秘塞：以葱涎调腊茶末，丸百丸，茶服，自通。不可用大黄利药，用之必死。 【《本草》】
    　　产后壮热，头痛颊赤，口干唇焦，烦渴昏闷：用松花、蒲黄、川芎当归、石膏等分为末，每服二钱，水二合，红花二捻，同煎七分，细呷。【《衍义》】[270p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[270p]

    After childbirth, if there are fifty to sixty loose stools per day: fry the excrement of the wood borer from mulberry in a pan until it turns yellow, then quickly mix it with water to achieve the desired consistency for consumption, using recovery as a measure. This is the formula from the late Gu Na, the sacrificial scholar.

    For postpartum restlessness, due to the upward rush of blood and qi: mix one sheng each of fresh Rehmannia juice and clear wine, boil and divide into two doses.

    For various ailments after childbirth: soak two sheng of Rehmannia juice with two dou of clean glutinous rice, let it ferment as usual until cooked, seal it for seven days, then take the pure drink regularly. Avoid raw cold foods, garlic, chicken, pork, and all toxic substances. It should be brewed a month in advance; do not make it in summer.

    For postpartum uterine prolapse: wash with warm water until soft, then smoke with male rat excrement.

    For urinary incontinence after childbirth: burn chicken nest grass into powder and take one qian with wine.

    For postpartum constipation: mix leeks with powdered tea, form into a hundred pills, take with tea for relief. Do not use rhubarb or laxatives, as this could be fatal.

    For postpartum fever, headache, red cheeks, dry mouth and lips, thirst and dullness: mix equal parts of pine pollen, cattail pollen, Chinese Angelica, and gypsum into a powder, taking two qian each time with two he of water and two pinches of safflower, boil for seven minutes, and sip slowly.[270p]

    产后寒热，心闷腹胀百病：羚羊角烧末，酒服方寸匕。 【《子母秘录》】
    　　产后口渴：用炼过蜜不计多少，熟水调服，即止。 【《产书》】
    　　产后盗汗，啬啬恶寒：茱萸一鸡子大，酒三升，渍半日，煮服。 【《千金翼》】
    　　产后遗尿：猪脬、猪肚各一个，糯米半升，入脬内，更以脬入肚内，同五味煮食。 【《集要》】
    　　产后虚羸，令人肥白健壮：羊脂二斤，生地黄汁一斗，姜汁五升，白蜜三升，煎如饴，温酒服一杯，日三。【《小品方》】
    　　产后血攻：或下血不止，心闷面青，身冷欲绝者：新羊血一盏饮之，三两服妙。 【《梅师方》】
    　　产后遗溺不禁：鸡屎烧灰，酒服方寸匕。 【《产宝》】
    　　产妇面(黑干)，或面如雀卵色：以羊胆、猪胰、细辛等分，煎三沸，夜涂，旦以浆水洗之。【《录验方》】[271p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[271p]

    Postpartum chills and fevers, heart palpitations and abdominal distension with numerous ailments: charred antelope horn, take with a small spoonful of wine.

    Postpartum thirst: use refined honey without measuring the quantity, mix with boiled water and take, it will stop.

    Postpartum night sweats and lingering cold: one egg-sized fruit of evodia, three liters of wine, steep for half a day, then boil and consume.

    Postpartum urinary incontinence: one pig bladder and one pig stomach, half a liter of glutinous rice, place inside the bladder and then put the bladder in the stomach, cook with five spices.

    Postpartum weakness and emaciation, promoting fatness, whiteness, and health: two pounds of sheep fat, ten liters of fresh raw rehmannia juice, five liters of ginger juice, three liters of honey, brew until syrupy, take one cup warm with wine, three times a day.

    Postpartum blood disturbances: if bleeding does not stop, heart palpitations, face turns pale, and body feels extremely cold: drink one cup of fresh sheep's blood, three taels is effective.

    Postpartum urinary issues: burn chicken droppings to ash, take with a small spoon of wine.

    For mothers with dark or ashen faces, or faces the color of sparrow eggs: mix lamb bile, pig pancreas, and asarum in equal parts, boil three times, apply at night, and wash with rice water in the morning.[271p]

    产后虚羸，瘦弱无力：羊肾一双，炮熟细切，和五味作羹，或作粥食良。 【《本草》】
    　　产后诸疾，及胎脏不安：杜仲去皮，瓦上焙干，木臼捣末，煮枣肉和丸弹子大，每服一丸，糯米饮下，日二服。【《胜金方》】
    　　产后虚汗：淡竹沥三合，暖服，须臾再服。 【《产宝》】
    　　产后阴脱：烧车缸头脂，纳酒中服。 【《子母秘录》，下同】
    　　产后下痢：没石子一个，烧存性研末，酒服，热即用饮下，日二。
    　　产后风邪，心虚惊悸：用猪心一枚，豆豉汁煮食之。 【《心镜》】
    　　产后阴脱：鳖头五枚烧研，井华水服方寸匕，日三。 【《千金》】　　又方：加葛根二两，酒服。 【《录验方》】
    　　产妇尿闭，鼠妇七枚熬研末，酒服。 【《千金》】
    　　产后虚汗发热，肢体疼痛，亦名蓐痨：用猪肾、葱豉和成作臛食之。 【《本草》】[272p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[272p]

    After childbirth, weakness and fatigue: take one pair of sheep kidneys, roast them until cooked and finely chopped, mix with five flavors to make a soup, or cook as a porridge for nourishment.

    For various ailments after childbirth and instability in the fetal organs: remove the skin of Eucommia, dry it over a tile, crush it in a wooden mortar, and boil it with jujube flesh to form pills the size of a bullet, taking one pill with glutinous rice wine, twice daily.

    For postpartum night sweats: combine three portions of fresh bamboo sap, warm it and take it; if necessary, take again after a while.

    For postpartum retention of the uterus: burn the fat from the tip of a car wheel and take it mixed with wine.

    For postpartum diarrhea: take one piece of a medicinal stone, burn it until it becomes ash, grind it into a fine powder, and take it with wine, using it while warm, twice daily.

    For postpartum wind pathogens and anxiety of the heart: use one pig heart, boil it with fermented soybean juice and consume it.

    For postpartum retention of the uterus: take five pieces of turtle heads, burn and grind them, mixing with well water and taking it with a spoon, three times a day. Additionally, add two taels of kudzu root and take it with wine.

    For urinary retention in postpartum women: take seven pieces of mouse droppings, boil and grind them, then consume with wine.

    For postpartum night sweats with fever and body aches, also known as "postpartum tuberculous condition": use pig kidneys, mix with scallions and fermented soybeans and consume it as food.[272p]

    产后中风，口噤身直，面青手足反张：竹沥饮一二升，即苏。 【《梅师方》】
    　　产后气喘：胡桃肉、人参各二钱，水一盏，煎七分，顿服。 【《本草》】
    　　产后虚羸：黄母鸡一只去毛，-背上开破，人生百合三枚。白粳米半升，缝合，入五味汁中，煮熟开腹，取百合并饭和汁作羹食之，并食肉。【《圣惠》】
    　　产后气逆：青橘皮为末，葱白、童子小便煎二钱，服。 【《经验后方》】
    　　产后尿闭不通者：陈皮一两，去自为末，每空心温酒服二钱，一服即通。 【《本草》】
    　　产后身热如火，皮如粟粒者：桃仁研泥同腊猪脂敷之，日一易之。 【《千金》】
    　　产后血闭：桃仁二十枚，去皮尖，藕一块，水煎服之，良。 【《经验方》】
    　　产后下痢赤白，里急后重：用桃胶焙干，沉香、蒲黄炒各等分为末，每服二钱，食前米饮下。【《妇人良方》】
    　　产后血滞冲心不下：生姜五两，水八升，煮取三升，分三服。[273p]

    Reasoning Trace

    This is a placeholder for a reasoning trace of the translation, describing in detail how the translation was created.[273p]

    After childbirth, if there is a stroke with locked mouth and stiff body, face turns blue and hands and feet are extended: take 1 to 2 sheng of bamboo juice, and one will recover.

    For postpartum asthma: take 2 qian of walnut meat and ginseng, boil with one cup of water until reduced by a third, then take at once.

    For postpartum weakness: take one plucked hen, open the back, and add three fresh lilies. Mix with half a sheng of white glutinous rice, sew it up, cook in five-flavor juice until done, then open the belly to take the lily, rice, and juice as a soup, and also consume the meat.

    For postpartum Qi reversal: grind the peel of green tangerine into powder, and boil 2 qian of spring onions and young boy’s urine, then take.

    For postpartum urinary obstruction: take 1 liang of dried tangerine peel, grind it into powder, mix with warm wine to take 2 qian, it will clear immediately.

    For postpartum body heat like fire, with skin like millet: grind peach kernels to a paste and apply with lard, changing once daily.
